# ViziAI

> AI-powered blood test tracking. Upload PDFs or import from e-Nabız, get visual health insights and trend analysis.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://www.viziai.app)
- [FAQ](https://www.viziai.app/en/faq)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.viziai.app/en/privacy)
- [e-Nabız Guide](https://www.viziai.app/en/enabiz-guide)

## Blog

- [Blog (Turkish)](https://www.viziai.app/tr/blog)
- [Blog (English)](https://www.viziai.app/en/blog)

## Key Features

- Upload blood test PDFs — AI extracts lab values automatically
- Import from e-Nabız (Turkish health portal) via Chrome extension
- Track biomarker trends over time with visual charts
- Manage family health profiles in one place
- Supports Turkish, English, German, Dutch, French, Spanish labs

## Contact

- Website: https://www.viziai.app
- Email: hello@viziai.app
